message:
bd-fnx: fix duplicate validation block + wire fnx_witness to render/validate

- Remove duplicate fnx_mode/fnx_projection/fnx_fallback validation block
  (copy-paste error from sibling agent)
- Wire fnx_enabled flag into layout_config for proper propagation
- Add fnx_results_hash function for witness hash generation
- Update build_fnx_witness to use traced_layout stats in hash
- Add build_fnx_validation_witness for validate command
- Add integration tests for fnx_witness in render/validate commands
- Update golden checksums for centrality tier changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
